rulings.Case Title: GEORGE S CLARK et al VS. BHP COPPER INC. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Honeywell International Inc., Fka Alliedsignal, Inc., Successor-In-Interest To The Bendix Corporations Notice Of Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Plaintiffs Claims Against Settled Resident Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation Have Not And Should Not Be Dismissed, Or In The Alternative, Be Severed
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, April 14, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Honeywell International Inc., Fka Alliedsignal, Inc., Successor-In-Interest To The Bendix Corporation's Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Plaintiffs Claims Against Settled Resident Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation Have Not And Should Not Be Dismissed, Or In The Alternative, Be Severed is continued to April 15, 2010 at 8:45 a.m. in Department 220 on Court's own motion. =(220/AJR)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Leafie Irene Cantlin To Perpetuate Testimony Of Donald Cantlin By Videotaped Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, April 14, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Petition of Leafie Irene Cantlin to perpetuate testimony of Donald Cantlin by videotaped deposition is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/AJR)
